# kSecImportItemKeyID

**Global Variable**

Key ID.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecImportItemKeyID: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type `CFDataRef`. This unique ID is often the SHA-1 digest of the public encryption key.
title: kSecImportItemKeyID
